extension.description: A VS Code extension for cleaning up Git branches (detect and delete dead/stale/gone branches, with full branch management).
command.openCleaner.title: Git Sohji: Open
command.queue.execute.title: Execute Deletion Queue
command.queue.clear.title: Clear Deletion Queue
command.queue.removeItem.title: Remove from Deletion Queue
command.queue.retry.title: Retry Deletion
command.queue.forceRetry.title: Force Retry (-D)
command.queue.switchAndRetry.title: Switch & Delete
command.queue.pruneRetry.title: Update Tracking Refs
command.switchRepository.title: Switch Repository
view.deletionQueue.name: Deletion Queue
viewsContainers.gitsouji.title: Git Sohji
viewsWelcome.deletionQueue.empty:
No branches queued for deletion.
[Open Git Sohji](command:gitsouji.openCleaner)
config.title: Git Sohji
config.baseBranch.description: Base branch used for dead-branch detection. If 'auto', prefers origin/HEAD, then tries main/master/develop.
config.protectedBranches.description: Protected branches excluded from delete/detect/rename/merge-source actions. Supports glob patterns with *.
config.confirmBeforeDelete.description: Show confirmation dialog before destructive actions.
config.includeRemoteInDeadCleanup.descri: When bulk deleting dead branches, also try to delete corresponding remote branches.
config.staleDays.description: Number of days since last commit to consider a branch as stale.
config.autoFetchPrune.description: Automatically run 'git fetch --prune' before detecting gone branches.
config.detectParentMerges.description: Also flag branches merged into a non-base parent branch (via a merge commit) with a `merged (parent)` badge. Shown for visibility only and excluded from cleanup. Disable to consider only merges into the base branch.
config.showStatusBadges.description: Show status badges (merged/stale/gone) in the branch list.
config.allowRemoteBranchDeletion.descrip: Allow deletion of remote branches. When disabled, remote branch deletion buttons are hidden.
